title: cuscuta planiflora var. callosa
intro: Cuscuta planiflora var. callosa, also known as Chinese dodder or Chinese seed dodder, is a type of parasitic plant that grows by attaching itself to other plants and extracting nutrients from them. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to clear heat, resolve toxicity, and promote digestion. The health benefits of Cuscuta planiflora var. callosa include improving blood circulation, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Cuscuta planiflora var. callosa is often combined with other herbs to make teas, capsules, and tablets, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of conditions.
